What is ERC404

Buy $GOFURS PRESALE

$CLAIM GOFURS

RECTIFICATION

Staking

Connect Manually

ERC404 is a new, experimental smart contract token standard. It has elements of normal ERC20 tokens and ERC721 NFTs. When you buy a token, if your balance is greater than 1 it automagically mints you an NFT. When you sell and your balance goes below 1, it automagically burns your NFT. This allows NFTs to plug into things like Uniswap V3 Pools.
When you buy a GOFURS token, you automatically get 1 of 6 GOFURS NFTs in your wallet. Check on opensea to see which one you got.
